query:
INSERT INTO users (name, email, passwordHash, loginMethod, role, lastSignedIn, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('Admin', 'codethemesx@gmail.com', '$2b$12$cXtfzVkAOslbryldB19tneOOW9ngx9RXSMvZB.7GTGT3OhjYA7asi', 'email', 'admin', NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  role = 'admin',
  passwordHash = '$2b$12$cXtfzVkAOslbryldB19tneOOW9ngx9RXSMvZB.7GTGT3OhjYA7asi',
  loginMethod = 'email',
  updatedAt = NOW();
